---
title: "ArcGIS Priority Counties for Prenatal Programs"
format: html
image: images/03-prenatal.png
---

<iframe width="700" height="600" allow="local-network-access; geolocation" title="Priority Counties for Prenatal Programs (ss)" src="https://gisucla.maps.arcgis.com/apps/mapviewer/index.html?configurableview=true&webmap=aac36bb47eac4bfabe73cbe8e41f0909&theme=light&scroll=false&center=-89.66910800000001,32.694846999999996&scale=4622324.434309" ></iframe>

Link to project: [https://arcg.is/1niqKj0](https://arcg.is/1niqKj0)
